item.title: Intelligence Insights: Jan 2026
item.description: This month’s Threat Insights leverages data from Bridewell’s global MDR and Incident Response engagements to expose the top malicious infrastructure of January 2025.

item.title: Why Point in Time Cloud Posture Assessments Are No Longer Enough: The Case for Continuous CSPM
item.description: Cloud environments are inherently dynamic. Resources are deployed, modified, and removed daily, configurations are updated and access permissions change frequently. This is often driven by automation, with limited visibility or oversight from security teams. Each change introduces the potential for misconfiguration, unintentionally creating exposure and attack paths that can be exploited if left undetected or poorly prioritised.

item.title: AI in Security Operations: Separating Capability from Hype
item.description: The security operations challenge is well documented. True positive rates often sit below five percent. Alert fatigue is endemic. Skilled analysts are scarce and expensive. These pressures have driven significant interest in AI in security operations, but the conversation has become clouded by vendor marketing and inflated expectations. For SOC managers responsible for delivering measurable outcomes, understanding where AI actually delivers value is essential.
